message:
feat(engine): add NewObject/NewArray IR3 instructions with interpreter and lowering support

Extend the IR3 instruction set with heap allocation operations and wire
them through the full compilation pipeline:

ir_contract.rs:
- Add Ir3Instruction::NewObject { dst } and Ir3Instruction::NewArray { dst }
  variants for allocating empty objects/arrays on the heap
- Add canonical serialization support (new_object/new_array op codes)
  for deterministic trace replay

baseline_interpreter.rs:
- Handle NewObject/NewArray in the instruction dispatch: allocate via
  alloc_object(), store the heap reference in dst register

lowering_pipeline.rs:
- Wire object/array literal lowering to emit the new instructions
  where applicable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
